prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 22919→23165→25911→28232→23725，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024 年曾大幅后移至 28232 名，2025 年回升至 23725 名，近 2 年波动幅度约 4500 名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 80 人，2024 年降至 73 人，2025 年进一步降至 58 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 107 人，较 2025 年扩招约 84.5%，显著增加招生名额，竞争压力相应上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 68 位持续上升至 2026 年第 61 位，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及外卖配送管理争议），但抖音热度排名第 38 位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，整体关注度处于中上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；心理学 A、教育学 A、马克思主义理论 A-，教育学与师范类学科实力突出；物理类招生专业涵盖计算机、电子信息、电气、机械等工科方向，与学校综合类定位匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024 年均为高热推荐/推荐，社会热度持续较高；湖北省 2026 年总考生约 39.37 万人，较 2025 年（约 39.12 万）小幅增加，物理类考生估算约 25.14 万人（按近年占比约 63.9%），竞争基数略有扩大；西南大学位于重庆，与湖北省相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在湖北省招生规模较大，2026 年物理类计划 107 人，属于该校在省外的重要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年物理类大幅扩招约 84.5%（招生名额从 58 人增至 107 人）这一核心因素，叠加湖北省考生总数小幅增加、学校软科排名持续上升、工科类专业社会热度较高，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次较 2025 年（23725 名）明显后移；预测最低位次约 35801 名，区间 35301–36300 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category fluctuated approximately from 22919 to 23165 to 25911 to 28232 to 23725, showing an overall trend of shifting backward with fluctuations. In 2024, it significantly shifted backward to 28232, and in 2025, it rebounded to 23725, with a fluctuation range of about 4500 positions in the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hubei Province was 80 students from 2021 to 2023, decreased to 73 in 2024, and further decreased to 58 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 107 students, an expansion of approximately 84.5% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots and correspondingly raising competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly related to disputes over food delivery management), but its Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, and overall attention is at an upper-middle level. No obvious records of admission cut-off gaps were observed. It has A-level disciplines in Psychology, A-level in Education, and A- in Marxist Theory, with outstanding strength in education and teacher-training disciplines. The Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and other engineering directions, matching the university's comprehensive positioning.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all highly recommended/recommended in 2024, with sustained high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from about 391,200 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 251,400 (based on a recent proportion of about 63.9%), indicating a slightly expanded competition base. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Hubei Province, with strong regional preference. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hubei Province, with 107 slots for the Physics Category in 2026, making it an important source region outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core factor of a significant expansion of approximately 84.5% in the Physics Category in 2026 (enrollment slots increasing from 58 to 107), combined with a slight increase in the total number of examinees in Hubei Province, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the high social popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025 (23725). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 35801, with a range of 35301–36300.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for the Physics Category is approximately 35801, with a range of 35301–36300. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 35000), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and Electronic Information. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 36000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering, with Tier 3 agriculture and forestry majors as stable safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3300→3613→2915→6489→4835, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2024, it dropped sharply to 6489, and in 2025 it rebounded to 4835, with a fluctuation range of about 1650 places in the last two years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 48 students in 2021, reduced to 14–19 students from 2022 to 2024, and further decreased to 10 students in 2025. In 2026, the plan slightly increased to 12 students, a 20% expansion compared to 2025, indicating a slight increase in enrollment quota.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly related to disputes over food delivery management), but its Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating an above-average overall attention level. No obvious record of admission cut-off gaps has been observed. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-) are strong disciplines, with education and teacher-training subjects having outstanding strength, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors such as Education, Chinese Language and Literature, and History.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, teacher-training/education majors were assessed as differentiated and wait-and-see, with overall stable popularity. Chinese Language/Chinese majors were assessed as recommended in 2024, with stable popularity for basic liberal arts subjects. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700, with an estimated 142,300 History Category examinees (based on the recent proportion of about 36.2%), a slight increase from 2025 (141,400). Southwest University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Hubei Province, with a strong regional preference. The university's enrollment scale for History Category in Hubei Province is relatively small (12 students planned for 2026), making it a medium-scale source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a slight 20% expansion in History Category enrollment in 2026 (from 10 to 12 students), a slight increase in History Category examinees in Hubei Province, the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the stable attractiveness of teacher-training advantage disciplines, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025 (4835). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5445, with a range of 4945–5945.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for History Category is approximately 5445, with a range of 4945–5945. If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4900), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, History, and Law. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 5900), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Public Administration and English, with Tier 3 majors as a safe backup choice.
